What Sets Us Apart

Built for the way
Myanmar actually rents.

Three things our competitors don't offer — and why renters who've been burned before keep coming back to us.

i.

Lawyer-verified.

An in-house licensed Myanmar lawyer reviews every listing — title, ownership, and rental terms — before it appears.

ii.

one platform.

English, Myanmar, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Thai. Browse, contact, and sign in any of them.

The Process

Three steps,
fully verified.

01.

Search.

Filter by city, budget, and property type. Browse in your preferred language with verified photos and accurate details.

02.

Verify.

Every listing is pre-verified by our in-house lawyer. Title checked. Ownership confirmed. Rental terms reviewed.

03.

Move in.

Sign a properly-drafted bilingual contract. Optional legal services for foreign tenants and complex transactions.

Beyond Listings

Property law,
made simple.

Our in-house licensed lawyer handles the legal side of property — so you don't have to.

i.

Rental contract drafting

Bilingual tenancy agreements covering deposit, maintenance, eviction, and exit clauses.

100,000 MMK · 3 days
ii.

Title verification

Independent search of title chain, ownership history, and outstanding charges.

200,000 MMK · 5 days
iii.

Tenant background check

Identity verification, employment confirmation, prior rental references.

75,000 MMK · 2 days
iv.

Foreign tenant compliance

Visa-rental compatibility, employment permit verification, FRC documentation.

150,000 MMK · 3 days
v.

Eviction guidance

Court-compliant notice procedures and timelines for problematic tenants.

200,000 MMK · Ongoing
vi.

Custom consultation

Foreign ownership structuring, dispute resolution, presale verification.

From 50,000 MMK
